MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Sue La, Ngoc Trinh's Motion to Vacate Dismissal Order issued on 6/3/2009 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days.
